title: MCBlocks
description: MCBlocks adds some new decorative blocks in the game.
body:
# **1.16 is in active development!**
- Yes you heard that right, MCBlocks for 1.16 is here! Expect some releases for 1.16 in the future.

# **About MC Blocks**

MCBlocks adds some new decorative blocks in the game.
It includes some blocks in Minecraft 1.18+.

**Why did I make this?**
- I wanted to have the 1.18+ blocks added into some older version because it would fit in nicer with my builds.
- For you guys to make cooler builds with the blocks accessible from newer versions.

**What versions does this support?**
- 1.15.2 ✅
- 1.16.* ✅
- 1.12.2 (Not out yet but planned)
- Fabric (It's not a no, it's a not now)

**What are some things you want to add in the future?**
- Stairs
- Copper and it's oxidization mechanic.

#  **How to obtain the Blocks** 
Please note that any recipes that include smelting a material are **BLASTING** recipes, you can look through JEI for recipes aswell. Their variations are how you craft them in 1.17+

- Obtaining Cobbled Deepslate

![Blasting recipe of cobbled deepslate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XyOgBIcr/images/4c8d2b974c9c19fe2222217264f525b5b5974d23.png)


- Obtaining Deepslate

![Blasting recipe of deepslate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XyOgBIcr/images/cb12beabf6b0fcc0cd0d670f2f2e1c82025bbe3d.png)

# New things as of the latest version: 1.16-1.0
- Obtaining Calcite

![Blasting recipe for calcite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XyOgBIcr/images/064c345d8e46b8e3e89f3e66e3381ed174454daf.png)

- Obtaining Tuff

![Blasting recipe for tuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XyOgBIcr/images/dc6466b5962f6d97c610e7424170c05d12a10ada.png)

- Making mud blocks involves right-clicking a dirt block with clay.

- New Moss Blocks and Amethyst Stuff!
